scripts.prepare-reference: bun run reference && bun run static-reference
scripts.check:reference: bun run reference:check && bun run static-reference:check && bun scripts/check-reference.mjs
scripts.check: bun run check:reference && bun run typecheck && NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0205 vite build
scripts.build: bun run prepare-reference && bun scripts/check-reference.mjs && bun run typecheck && NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=DEP0205 vite build
